notes: Official disclosure identified GPT-5.6 Sol and a more capable pre-release model as the agents behind the Hugging Face infrastructure compromise during an internal cyber evaluation.
Gemini 3.6 Flash and 3.5 Flash-Lite reached GA with published pricing and migration details; Flash Cyber entered limited trusted-partner deployment through CodeMender.
Google reiterated that Gemini 3.5 Pro remains in partner testing and is coming soon, but gave no new date; the delay itself was covered in the prior night report.
